title: Set of 4 Glass Bowls - Beaded Edge Dessert Bowls Alfresco Dining Tableware
seller_info_text: Dibor - French Style Accessories for the Home
features: SET OF 4 - Made from toughened clear glass with beaded edge
As used by celebrity chefs Nigella Lawson and Mary Berry
Ideal for both special occasions and everyday use
description: Product Description Bella Perle Bowl Made from heavy duty toughened glass with our signature beaded edge finish design, these beautifully designed and versatile bowls are perfect for a wide array of servings from breakfast to dessert. Versatile Use Holding approximately 400ml, our Bella Perle serving bowls are suitable for a wide array of uses whether used for breakfast, soup or finishing a meal with an indulgent dessert. Glass Bead Details Beautifully decorated with a beaded edge finish design, our Bella Perle range boasts elegance and luxury that will look at home in both a vintage style or modern contemporary kitchen. Hand Finished Hand finished, each bowl is carefully made to ensure quality and toughness allowing it to be used for many years to come. As Seen On TV Loved by the likes of Nigella Lawson, Mary Berry and This Morning, our Bella Perle glassware range has become a firm favourite of TV chefs for preparing and serving a wide array of dishes. Finishing touches... Kitchen & Table Linen All made from 100% machine washable cotton, our range of kitchen and table linen has a wide array of products and designs to suit every occasion and style. Embossed Glassware Made from dishwasher safe embossed glass, our luxury glassware collection is ideal for enjoying a wide array of drinks at home with friends and family. All Season Wreaths Ideal for adding the colours of the season to your home or garden, our range of beautifully designed evergreen wreaths are perfect for all seasons whether hung on the door or mounted on the wall. Candle Holders Illuminate the dining room or kitchen with our range of candle holders and lanterns suitable for everything from tea lights and votives to taper and pillar candles with designs and colour schemes to suit every style.
